name: echo-research
description: An evidence-first AI research desk for public-market investors.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web "npm run dev --workspace @echo/api" "npm run dev --workspace @echo/web"
scripts.test: npm run build:native && npm test --workspace @echo/domain && npm test --workspace @echo/db && npm test --workspace @echo/api && npm test --workspace @echo/worker && npm test --workspace @echo/contracts && npm test --workspace @echo/finance-native && cargo test --workspace
